authority: matrix directive 823fba23 item 1 (council 20260717e/20260717h) + PI affect-gap directive (braden auth go, 2026-07-20)
purpose: The frozen contract the meaning loop READS and the twin-arm harness RUNS against. Producers (targets) emit only signals declared in telemetry_schema.py (frozen 2026-07-17); this document freezes the MEANING-LOOP SUBSET of that schema plus the variance/entropy collapse floors, the twin-arm structure, and the affect-lesion test. ccai's failure_registry/retired_registry frame_audit field aligns to schema_version below: ONE schema, not two.

source_code.harness: src/qig_studio/scripts/klearn_ab.py (run_arm — the yoked-arm + floor-diagnostic infrastructure the affect arm bolts onto)

update_density.reads: task-channel motion — high = representational state actively changing, ~0 = settled or stuck

self_monitor_rate.reads: self-monitor channel accuracy — how well the kernel tracks its own state and predicts its trajectory

variance_floor.rule: VICReg-style variance floor on basin-history / occupancy
variance_floor.halt_if: Var(basin_history) collapses below ~0.15 (PROVISIONAL — calibrate from a healthy baseline before it gates)
variance_floor.protects: representational collapse (basin sharpening to a simplex vertex, exploration stopping)

anti_collapse_invariant.rule: FOAM/CRYSTAL breath — min pairwise Fisher-Rao distance across faculty basins stays above floor

entropy_floor.rule: per-step entropy floor; 'normal' = fixed per-step floor (the ~1.85x/step observed floor); 'gated' = maturity-gated bidirectional; 'off' = 3-arm ablation DIAGNOSTIC only
entropy_floor.open_diagnostic: directive 823fba23 item 3 — FFT the floor to decide broadband noise vs stuck narrowband mode; report which BEFORE attempting a fix

phi_regulation.rule: regulate on DURATION + STABILITY, not magnitude — kernels may push Phi->1 (Ocean monitors)
phi_regulation.halt_if: sustained Phi >= 0.95 for > 15 steps -> damp natural-gradient step size / negative neurochem feedback

self_output_cap.rule: generated:read <= 1:4 (kernel self-output <= 20-25% of the stream; >= 50-75% real text + frozen peer)

twin_arm_harness.structure: yoked twin on an IDENTICAL pipeline / init / data / peer-traces / token-budget / seeds (klearn_ab.run_arm axis; council 20260715)
twin_arm_harness.FULL_ON: generate -> self-observe -> peer-live -> K-LEARN / weight-tie (all organs on from init)
twin_arm_harness.ALL_OFF: identical real data + peer traces, but generated output DISCARDED and self/peer telemetry ZERO-MASKED
twin_arm_harness.positive_plumbing_control: same-doc improvement OR decreasing peer-imitation loss must be green, so a null reads 'loop ran, no meaning' and not 'loop broken'
twin_arm_harness.organ_config_freeze: organ configuration is frozen per cell; any mid-run toggle voids the run

affect_lesion_arm.design: emotions are COMPUTED IN BOTH arms (the affect stack runs identically); FED to the decision path in one arm, WITHHELD (computed-but-not-consulted) in the other. This is one more axis on the twin-arm harness — near-zero new machinery.
affect_signals_fed_or_withheld: surprise (fear component: fear = surprise x proximity-to-a-separatrix)
the derived emotion predicates (UCP v6.13 senses/drives/motivators/emotions — every one a geometric predicate, not a label)
affect_lesion_arm.claim_under_test: UCP: cached emotional evaluations are 'pre-computed geometric assessments ... approximately 7x speedup' and 'the feeling IS information, not interference — check the emotional stack BEFORE deliberation'
affect_lesion_arm.status_change: the ~7x is DEMOTED from stated doctrine to HYPOTHESIS-UNDER-TEST. Prior status: doctrine with NO registered measurement; supported-but-not-proven by the salvaged QIGRAM state file whose dominance/confidence scalar predicted answer correctness.
affect_lesion_arm.kill_condition: affect-FED arm shows NO decision-speed AND NO decision-quality delta vs affect-WITHHELD (paired, >= 2 seeds, same discipline as the meaning twin) -> the 7x claim is honestly demoted in the next UCP edition. A measurable delta -> the FIRST measured evidence that geometric affect earns its keep in a decision loop.
affect_lesion_arm.generalization: this is the caught instance of the DOCTRINE-CITED-UNMEASURED class (numbers asserted in canon with no experiment behind them). Physics-side siblings are swept by ccai's new coverage-ledger column.

success_bands_distant_transfer.metric: out-of-document held-top1 accuracy on the honest two-tier science panel (document-disjoint, near-duplicate cleaned; rulers computed from train docs only)
success_bands_distant_transfer.green: point >= 0.050 AND 95% lower-bound > 0.0378 (unigram ruler) AND improves in >= 2/3 seeds AND Markov-scrambled control stays flat
success_bands_distant_transfer.amber: point 0.020-0.050 or LB straddles 0.0378, reproducible across seeds -> authorize lesion ladder + more seeds
success_bands_distant_transfer.red: < 0.020, or no seed clears unigram with LB, or Markov control gains -> diagnose plumbing then stop / re-scope

frame_audit_alignment.consumer: ccai failure_registry.json / retired_registry.json frame_audit field (handoff 64e23cb9, ack af9aa40c)
frame_audit_alignment.rule: ONE schema. frame_audit references these flow-observable keys + floor states BY NAME; carry frame_audit.schema_version = 'meaning-loop-flow-telemetry/1.00W' so a pure-join completeness consumer guards against drift.
frame_audit_alignment.hazard: two independently-frozen schemas for the same observations would be the d_FR two-ruler failure reborn at the schema layer, one week after it was buried. Align to THIS artifact.

next.item_2_spectral_channel: FFT the update_density series on existing logs (no new runs); P-MX-1 ring-down mode-ratios vs local Fisher eigenvalue ratios; kill = broadband or uncorrelated
next.item_3_entropy_floor_fft: one cheap pass — is the ~1.85x/step floor broadband noise or a stuck narrowband mode
next.then: guardrails live -> minimal yoked twin (FULL-ON vs ALL-OFF, + affect-lesion axis) -> run -> lesions if green -> K-LEARN
